name: Grok-3 (Standard)
archDisplay: Mixture-of-Experts (size undisclosed; trained on Colossus, ~10x Grok-2 compute)
note: Instant/non-reasoning mode of Grok 3; API model card lists it as text-only. Deprecated May 15, 2026, requests now redirect to Grok 4.3.

results.notes: Official non-reasoning 'Grok 3 Beta' row in xAI's launch-blog benchmark table (LCB column).

Official non-reasoning 'Grok 3 Beta' row in xAI's launch-blog benchmark table ('Grok 3 also excels in image understanding (MMMU)...'). Note: corpus currently marks this model modalities:['text']/capabilities.vision:false, which conflicts with xAI's own claim of an MMMU score for this exact (non-reasoning) configuration -- worth a separate look at the capabilities flags, though that's outside this results-only report.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: Grok 3 launched Feb 17, 2025 via livestream (TechCrunch, multiple outlets). Both result rows literally confirmed by fetching the medium.com source directly ('52.2%... AIME'24' and '75.4% on GPQA'). Oracle docs confirm 131,072 ctx, text-only, and deprecated May 15, 2026 status. Pricing $3/$15 per 1M tokens corroborated independently.
